sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n10182" key="a)ntimhxa/nhma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντιμηχᾰ´ν-ημα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n10182.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">counter-engine</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">device,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">μηχανήμασιν ἀ. εὐτρεπίζειν</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1620.tlg001:4:2:20" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Polyaen.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.2.20</biblScope></bibl></cit>, cf. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1204.tlg001:9:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ath.Mech.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
